title: North Macedonia — Application for Registration of Establishment of a Sole Trader in the Trade Register (Пријава за упис на основање на трговец-поединец)
description: The Central Registry's (Централен регистар на Република Северна Македонија, ЦРРСМ) universal founding-registration form, Образец ПО (“Пријава за упис на основање на субјект во Трговскиот регистар и Регистарот на други правни лица”), scoped in this v1.0.0 to the sole-trader (трговец-поединец) registration path — the most common, citizen-relevant single-founder business-formation route the source form supports. The underlying document is a genuine 537-widget AcroForm (confirmed independently via pdfjs-dist getAnnotations() across all 11 pages) shared across every trade-register and other-legal-entity subject type CRM registers (sole trader, ДООЕЛ/ДОО LLC-equivalents, joint-stock and partnership forms, foreign-subject branches, and institutions/funds/cooperatives under the other-legal-entities register). This schema models the sole trader's own submitter identification, the entity's identity/duration/registered-seat data, the trader's self-representation (as both the sole trader and the natural person representing the registrant, since a sole trader has no separate management/supervisory bodies), the activities to be registered (a bounded subset of the form's own larger activity table, plus an optional foreign-trade declaration), the predominant-activity/bank/VAT/contact block, a sole-trader-relevant subset of the form's supporting-document checklist, the decision-delivery channel, and the closing applicant/signature block. Sections and widgets specific to company-governance entity types (share capital, founders/shareholders, boards, procurators, branch offices, and the corresponding governance-document attachments), to the other-legal-entities register, and to the form's own continuation/additional-page mechanism are out of scope for v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md for the full field-inventory reconciliation and every disclosed scoping judgment call, including the future-companion-schema path (e.g. a ДООЕЛ/LLC-formation variant) the issue that authored this document explicitly anticipated. Advances North Macedonia's Business Formation vertical. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of North Macedonia or the Central Registry.

authority.name: Централен регистар на Република Северна Македонија

source.documentRef: Образец ПО — Пријава за упис на основање на субјект во Трговскиот регистар и Регистарот на други правни лица

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-2941, following the GOV-2937 research cycle's pre-verification). Independently re-fetched this cycle directly from crm.com.mk (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 19,571,140 bytes, sha256 89f02ea72ff080151b98926fcaf20464480b19c4361543fb03f83cae0c960633 — matching the pre-verification cycle's own recorded size) and independently re-extracted all fields from scratch via pdfjs-dist getAnnotations() across all 11 pages: 537 genuine Widget annotations, matching the pre-verification cycle's count exactly. This v1.0.0 scopes to the sole-trader (трговец-поединец) path per the issue's own scoping guidance (mirroring si/ajpes's precedent, GOV-2910); see VERIFICATION.md for the complete 85-of-537 widget-to-field reconciliation and every disclosed scoping judgment call. Advances North Macedonia's Business Formation vertical.

fields.name: isSoleTrader
fields.label: Вид на субјект — Трговец-поединец
fields.description: Fixed to true for this schema's scope: this document models only the sole-trader (Трговец-поединец) registration path of Образец ПО's shared, multi-entity-type form. The form's own other 7 entity-type checkboxes in §2.1 (ДООЕЛ, ДОО, Јавно трговско друштво, Акционерско друштво, Командитно друштво, Командитно друштво со акции, Стопанска интересна заедница, Подружница на странски субјект, Друго) and all of §2.2 (registration in the register of other legal entities) are out of scope for v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Образец ПО p.1, §2.1 Вид на субјект на упис во трговски регистар, 'Трговец-поединец'

fields.name: representativeIsSoleTrader
fields.label: Орган на застапување — Трговец-поединец
fields.description: Fixed to true for this schema's scope: the sole trader represents the registrant personally. The form's other 6 representation-body role checkboxes in this section (Управител(и), Содружник на ЈТД, Комплементар, Управен Одбор, Надзорен Одбор, Одбор на директори) and the 'Својство' board-capacity checkboxes (Претседател/Член/Независен член/Неизвршен член/Извршен член) describe company-governance bodies that do not exist for a sole trader, and are out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Образец ПО p.3, §9.1 Орган на застапување, управување и надзор — трговски регистар, 'Трговец-поединец'
